name: Asparagus Soup (Nz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tips off the asparagus, approximately 1.5 inches from the top, and wash thoroughly.
2. Cover the asparagus tips in a pot with boiling water and cook until tender. Remove and set aside.
3. Cook the remaining asparagus in the same boiling water until tender. Drain and grate the asparagus, then add to the milk.
4. Melt the butter in a separate pan and mix with flour, salt, and pepper. Gradually incorporate the grated asparagus into the mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil for 5 minutes.
6. Add the cooked asparagus tips and serve.
